email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Growth Marketer bij Base360. Uw visie om het besturingssysteem voor B2C-merken te worden, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in SEO, GEO en contentmarketing.

Bij Episto optimaliseer ik on-page SEO en schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content om organische groei te realiseren. Daarnaast bouw en beheer ik WordPress-sites, wat me een solide technische basis geeft. Op mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data en GEO toe om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze hands-on ervaring met experimenteren en data-analyse maakt me klaar om groeikanalen te bezitten en conversies te optimaliseren.

Ik ben leergierig, zelfstandig en werk graag met moderne AI-tools. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief via cursussen. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn groeimindset en technische vaardigheden in te zetten voor Base360. Ik hoor graag of we kunnen kennismaken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Growth Marketer role at Base360. Your vision to become the operating system for B2C brands strongly aligns with my experience in SEO, GEO, and content marketing.

At Episto, I own on-page SEO and write keyword-targeted content to drive organic growth. I also build and maintain WordPress sites, giving me a solid technical foundation. On mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. This hands-on experience with experimentation and data analysis prepares me to own growth channels and optimize conversions.

I am eager to learn, self-directed, and comfortable using modern AI tools. My Dutch is B1 and I am actively improving through classes. I speak fluent English and Turkish.

I look forward to bringing my growth mindset and technical skills to Base360. I would love to discuss how I can contribute.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Toen ik de vacature voor Growth Marketer bij Base360 las, voelde ik direct een klik. Uw missie om het besturingssysteem voor B2C-merken te worden, spreekt me aan omdat ik geloof in de kracht van data-gedreven groei en AI. Mijn ervaring in SEO, GEO en contentmarketing sluit naadloos aan bij wat u zoekt.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO en het schrijven van keyword-gerichte content. Ik bouw en onderhoud WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra, en gebruik tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs en Google Analytics om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Dit heeft me geleerd om snel te experimenteren, resultaten te analyseren en schaalbare strategieën te implementeren.

Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik GEO en gestructureerde data toe om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik implementeerde JSON-LD schema, entity markup en llms.txt, wat de search-health score meetbaar verhoogde. Deze ervaring met opkomende kanalen sluit aan bij uw focus op AI en innovatie.

Ik ben een snelle leerling en werk graag met moderne tools. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling (AngularJS, JavaScript) geeft me een voorsprong bij het bouwen van landingspagina's en het optimaliseren van funnels. Ik ben resultaatgericht, analytisch en niet bang om te falen en bij te sturen.

Hoewel mijn Nederlands nog B1 is, volg ik actief lessen om te verbeteren. Ik communiceer vloeiend in het Engels en Turks.

Ik wil graag bijdragen aan de groei van Base360 en samen met het team iets groots opbouwen. Ik hoop dat ik de kans krijg om mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear hiring team,

When I read the Growth Marketer job description at Base360, I felt an immediate connection. Your mission to become the operating system for B2C brands resonates with me because I believe in data-driven growth and AI. My experience in SEO, GEO, and content marketing aligns perfectly with what you are looking for.

At Episto, I own on-page SEO and write keyword-targeted content. I build and maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra, and use tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Analytics to measure and optimize performance. This has taught me to experiment quickly, analyze results, and implement scalable strategies.

On my own project mirook.com, I apply GEO and structured data to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines. I implemented JSON-LD schema, entity markup, and llms.txt, measurably raising the search-health score. This experience with emerging channels aligns with your focus on AI and innovation.

I am a fast learner and enjoy working with modern tools. My technical background in web development (AngularJS, JavaScript) gives me an edge in building landing pages and optimizing funnels. I am results-driven, analytical, and not afraid to fail and iterate.

Although my Dutch is B1, I am actively taking classes to improve. I communicate fluently in English and Turkish.

I would love to contribute to Base360's growth and build something great together. I hope to have the opportunity to discuss my motivation and skills in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on SEO & GEO experience: on-page SEO, keyword research, structured data, and AI search optimization (GEO/AEO) to drive organic growth.
- Content marketing & WordPress: writing keyword-targeted blogs, building and maintaining sites with Elementor/Astra, and managing content.
- Data-driven experimentation: using SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to track performance and optimize campaigns.
- Technical foundation: front-end development (AngularJS, JavaScript) enabling funnel and landing page optimization.
- Self-directed learner: quick to pick up new tools and AI technologies, with a growth mindset and entrepreneurial drive.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
